items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario where a persona accidentally posts data to the wrong business. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or outcomes related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system can handle such an error. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this particular scenario, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the expected result.
